blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,476 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
